title: Notifications - Onboarding - Allow, UI
scenario: Verify that after allowing notifications during onboarding, the Notification settings screen shows a master toggle set to ON and allows individual notification toggles to be changed.
steps: 1. Launch the app and begin the onboarding flow.
4. Navigate to the Notification settings screen.
5. Observe the master toggle for notifications.
6. Attempt to change individual notification toggles.
expected: The Notification settings screen shows a master toggle set to ON, and individual notification toggles can be changed.
